name: claude-skills
description: Production-tested skills for SEO, security auditing, writing, adversarial refinement, and web tools

plugins.name: seo
plugins.description: Comprehensive SEO audit, optimization, and automation. Covers technical SEO, on-page optimization, local business SEO, Google Business Profile, AI search readiness, content strategy, link building, and a full DIY automation system.

plugins.name: security-audit
plugins.description: Comprehensive cybersecurity audit framework following OWASP Top 10 and NIST 800-53. Red-team methodology for web application security review.

plugins.name: writing
plugins.description: Research-backed writing standards for human-quality content. Anti-AI detection, headline optimization, platform guides for X, LinkedIn, and web copy, persuasion frameworks, and pre-publish quality gates.

plugins.name: web-reader
plugins.description: Fetches web page content as clean markdown for analysis and processing.

plugins.name: digest
plugins.description: Fetches any web page or X/Twitter post, analyzes content, saves structured analysis to Obsidian, and recommends actionable uses including content ideas, action items, and project connections.

plugins.name: skill-creator
plugins.description: Create, test, harden, and continuously improve Claude Code skills. Unified workflow combining eval infrastructure, TDD methodology, and self-improving learning loops.

plugins.name: interconnection-audit
plugins.description: Audits Obsidian vault for missing cross-note connections. Scans all notes, discovers relationships using typed signals, scores vault interconnection health, and proposes frontmatter connections with context lines optimized for LLM efficiency.

plugins.name: md-to-docx
plugins.description: Convert Markdown files to Word documents (.docx) using pandoc.

plugins.name: overnight-optimizer
plugins.description: General-purpose autonomous experiment runner for Claude Code. Implements the autoresearch pattern (modify, eval, keep/revert, repeat) to optimize any target: prompts, configs, code, templates.

plugins.name: plan-review
plugins.description: Thorough plan review before implementation. Two modes: /plan-review (4-section standard review) and /plan-mega-review (10-section exhaustive review). Challenges scope, reviews architecture/code quality/tests/performance/security/observability/deployment.

plugins.name: setup-audit
plugins.description: Audit Claude Code setup for dead weight — default behavior overlap, contradictions, redundancy, one-off fixes, and vagueness across CLAUDE.md files, skills, and memories.

plugins.name: verify-memories
plugins.description: Verify machine-checkable rules in auto-memory feedback entries. Sweeps memory files for verify: frontmatter blocks and runs checks.

plugins.name: business-mileage
plugins.description: Monthly business driving mileage from calendar events for expense reimbursement. Fetches Outlook events, filters virtual meetings, builds trip chains, looks up distances via Google Maps, and generates IRS mileage reports.

plugins.name: gsc-bigquery
plugins.description: Analyze Google Search Console data via BigQuery bulk exports. 22 SQL query templates for SEO analysis including anonymous traffic, content decay, cannibalization, ARIMA forecasting, and anomaly detection. Replaces a 26-tool MCP server with zero overhead.

plugins.name: autoreason
plugins.description: Adversarial refinement for subjective content through multi-agent debate. Eliminates LLM sycophancy and over-compromise via context-isolated critic, author, synthesizer, and blind judge agents that iterate until convergence.

plugins.name: annealing-prompts
plugins.description: Prompt optimization methodology for cheap-model LLM pipelines. Three-phase mutation diversity rules (bootstrap / generalize / polish), train/val/holdout splits, and overfitting-resistant graduation metrics for iteratively refining prompts that need Haiku-grade cost at Opus-grade quality.
